---
title: "Section 3: Assessment and Interaction"
id: "mod001-se01-sec03"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec03"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Assessment Page](mod001-se01-sec03-sp01.qmd)

- [Interactive Page](mod001-se01-sec03-sp02.qmd)

- [Overview Variant](mod001-se01-sec03-sp03.qmd)

- [Concept Variant](mod001-se01-sec03-sp04.qmd)

- [Activity Variant](mod001-se01-sec03-sp05.qmd)

- [Reflection Variant](mod001-se01-sec03-sp06.qmd)

- [Summary Page](mod001-se01-sec03-sp07.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../02-data-and-media-pages/mod001-se01-sec02-sp07.qmd">

            <span class="nav-title">Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec03-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Assessment Page</span>

    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
